case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF VS TAGUIAM AMBROSIO

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TAGUIAM AMBROSIO

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT TAGUIAM AMBROSIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-19-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,434.76 AS TO DEFENDANT TAGUIAM AMBROSIO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAGUIAM AMBROSIO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $14.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,014.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO AMBROSIO TAGUIAN RETURNED MOVED.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TAGUIAM AMBROSIO
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $3,625.97 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT TAGUIAM AMBROSIO
